channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Left-wing counterprogramming of Trump's UFC event fails as celebrities face online ridicule
item.description: Celebrities like Bette Midler and Robert De Niro were widely mocked online for their anti-Trump concert aimed at countering his UFC event.

item.title: Trump aims to end Ukraine war at G7 summit
item.description: President Donald Trump joined global leaders at the G7 summit in France, where he promoted his preliminary plan to end the Ukraine war.

item.title: Senate could confirm Trump's DNI pick this week
item.description: President Trump's nominee for director of national intelligence may be approved by the Senate as early as Thursday, according to reports.

item.title: Chaos in New Jersey: Suspect hits ICE agent, agent returns fire
